resource_notes: Foundational task; requires deep understanding of AWS VPC limits and CIDR planning.
alternative_approach: Use pre-built AWS modules (reduces time by 30% but limits customizability)
risk_factors: AWS Quota limits on VPCs or EIPs in the target region
mitigation_strategy: Pre-check AWS Service Quotas before execution

resource_notes: High complexity due to IRSA and Security Group configurations. Long feedback loop on Apply.
alternative_approach: Use EKS Blueprints (saves config time, high learning curve)
risk_factors: IAM Policy misconfiguration blocking node registration
mitigation_strategy: Peer review of IAM policies by Security Architect before apply

resource_notes: Requires tuning of confidence thresholds for entity detection to avoid over-redaction.
alternative_approach: Use Presidio library instead of AWS Comprehend (lower cost, higher config)
mitigation_strategy: Implement 'Human-in-the-Loop' review flag for low confidence scores

resource_notes: Critical security component. Requires idempotent processing logic.
alternative_approach: None - Webhook verification is mandatory for Stripe security
risk_factors: Replay attacks or processing delays causing state mismatches
mitigation_strategy: Implement rigorous signature verification and distributed locking (Redis)

resource_notes: Focus heavily on keyboard navigation and focus trapping for accessibility compliance.
alternative_approach: Use pre-styled component library (Mantine/Chakra) - Deviates from design system
mitigation_strategy: Automated Axe testing in CI pipeline
